title: Why ‘Vishwaguru’ not advancing BRICS summit for diplomatic initiative on West Asia crisis: Congress
summary: Congress general secretary in charge of communications, Jairam Ramesh, pointed out that the 18th annual BRICS+ Summit will take place in New Delhi under India's Presidency later this year, with Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa, Argentina, Egypt, Ethiopia, Saudi Arabia, Iran, and the UAE as members.

title: Chaitanya Baghel case: Supreme Court to hear question of law; ED maintains case is infructuous
summary: The ₹2,000 crore liquor scam involves allegations that politicians, excise officials, and private operators manipulated the liquor trade in Chhattisgarh between 2019 and 2022

title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Dharmendra Pradhan says Centre committed to making education affordable
summary: Nirmala Sitharaman to introduce Corporate Laws (Amendment) Bill in Lok Sabha; Union Minister of State (MoS) for Corporate Affairs Harsh Malhotra will make a statement on action taken by the Government on the previous recommendations of the Committee on Demands for Grants (2024-25)

title: Kashmiris collect donations for war-hit Iran; Iranian Embassy says 'will never forget kindness'
summary: The donations have been collected, especially in Budgam and Baramulla, with a considerable population of Shias.

title: This is a ‘new dawn’ in Ladakh: Sonam Wangchuk
T.N. Assembly election: residents of Tiruttani constituency seek more support to improve their livelihood
summary: Farmers, who recently set up a producer organisation and started growing millets, complain that they still do not have machinery needed to process the crop. Residents say work to lay a second access road to Subramaniaswami Temple is yet to be completed, with land acquisition still under way

title: Air Force staffer arrested for spying for Pakistani handlers, sharing sensitive information
summary: During interrogation, the accused revealed that he had been in contact with Pakistani intelligence operatives since 2023 and was allegedly sharing confidential information in exchange for money, officials said

title: Assembly Elections LIVE updates: ECI likely to publish SIR supplementary voter list for W.B. today
summary: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan, in an interview with The Hindu, predicts the BJP will not win a seat again in the upcoming Assembly polls
